# POST /api/auth/login-token

**User login with complete user information**

Authenticates user and returns access token, refresh token, and complete user information including roles and permissions

Operation ID: `loginWithToken`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Request Body

Schema: `AuthRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | Yes |  |  |
| password | string | Yes |  |  |

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `UserInfo`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| accessToken | string | No |  | JWT access token for API authentication |  |
| expiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  | Access token expiration time in seconds | 900 |
| refreshToken | string | No |  | Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens |  |
| refreshExpiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  | Refresh token expiration time in seconds | 604800 |
| userId | integer (int64) | No |  | User ID |  |
| username | string | No |  | Username |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  | Whether the user account is enabled |  |
| roles | array<string> | No |  | User's assigned roles |  |
| permissions | array<string> | No |  | User's permissions (flattened from all roles) |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "refreshExpiresIn": 604800
}
```

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |
